summary: Frontend-only test of iteration 183: Client Hub redesign, Decision Centre removal, Client Investments read-only, Client Sandbox tab with full isolation, Sandbox Reset, and SMSF sub-tab. All 7 target flows verified working via live Playwright run against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer emits width(-1)/height(-1) warning on first tab-switch render; self-recovers once tab becomes visible. Cosmetic console warning only — chart renders correctly on screenshot. Consider wrapping chart in a min-height container or gating render on active tab.

action_items: (Optional) Silence Recharts width(-1) warning in ClientSandbox by mounting chart only after the sandbox tab is active, or by giving the ResponsiveContainer wrapper a fixed/min height.
critical_code_review_comments: ClientSandbox.jsx isolation is correctly implemented via React useState — no localStorage, no window writes, no fetch. Verified at runtime: moving sliders adds ZERO new localStorage keys and Thompson Family adviser view still shows $9.6M NW / retire age 67.
AdvisorCommandCenter.jsx: single-tab Tabs wrapper retained around DailyBriefing content — Decision Centre fully excised (data-testid=tab-decisions count = 0, no 'Decision Centre' tab text found).
AdviserHub.jsx: hydration ok — 'PRACTICE' eyebrow, 'Client Hub' h1, households subline, 7 tabs (3 practice + vertical divider + 4 CRM) all present and Segments tab navigable.
SimpleClientView.jsx InvestmentsTab is read-only — zero 'Add' buttons, 'View only — contact your adviser to adjust holdings' footer visible.
Sandbox Reset verified: mutated retireAge slider from 67→72, clicked reset, all 8 values returned to seeded defaults ($5.3M / $120k / $180k / 50 / 67 / 92 / 7.0% / 2.50%).
SMSF sub-tab no longer shows 'SMSF failed to load' ErrorBoundary banner.
seed_data_creation: None. localStorage set at runtime: wealth_command_compliance_v5=permanent; app_mode toggled between adviser/client; selected_client={id:'thompson_family'} for adviser phase.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user asks verified green. Confidence measured at 99-100% with Thompson-seeded defaults. Sandbox is pure React state: writes no keys to localStorage (confirmed via Object.keys(localStorage) diff before/after slider changes). Adviser Dashboard still displays unchanged CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family (NW $9.61M, retire age 67) after sandbox play. One cosmetic Recharts warning on first sandbox render (width -1) — chart still paints correctly.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures. Test-script note: a single Array.map innerText.includes check returned False for 5 stat-card labels despite the cards rendering; all other Client Hub assertions (h1, eyebrow, subline, tabs, divider, Segments click) passed, so this is a Playwright evaluation-timing artifact, not a product bug.
